race.description: BECOME A BRC MEMBER MAIDEN PLATE
race.comment: The well-related SWING STATE (7) (half to G2 winner In Good Order) just missed the frame at Eagle Farm when resuming and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Ticks plenty of boxes for a race like this. TSZYUYA (8) also hails from a handy family (half to G2 winner Amazonian Lass) and looks to be on the doorstep of a maiden victory. Looms as the main danger. BIG TECH (2) has been thereabouts at the past three efforts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three aspirations. CRYPTO MAGIC (3) has placed two from three around this circuit and may earn some minor money again. SECRET FENKEL (6) best of the rest while fresh.
